description: The DebugSphereRaycast component is used to show the multiple hit normals (1 per collider) of a sweep raycast of a sphere. This essentially acts as a fat raycast, which has thickness. Unfortunately this raycast is only for Debug purposes. Is simulated on the host machine.

fields.Direction: the direction and distance the raycast should go.
fields.Radius: How far the raycasts created should go.
